case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE CO. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,200.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
